title: Medieval Buildings [Nether Edition]
description: New incredible medieval-style structures for the Nether!
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Medieval_Buildings_Nether_Edition/BH_MBNE_header.webp) Journey deeper into the Medieval Buildings universe with this thrilling Nether edition. Explore five stunning medieval-inspired structures rising from the blazing landscapes of the Nether. Perfect for adventurers, each structure brims with hidden treasures, cunning traps, and fierce foes. Prepare for an unforgettable challenge in this infernal realm! Compatible with the main biome mods for the Nether, including: Biomes O' Plenty, Regions Unexplored, Better Nether, Incendium, Gardens of the Dead and many more! **Don't forget to download the main version of Medieval Buildings! [Click here!](https://modrinth.com/mod/medieval-buildings)** **And the version for the END dimension is also available! [Click Here!](https://modrinth.com/mod/medieval-buildings-end-edition)** ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Medieval_Buildings_Nether_Edition/BH_MBNE_summary.webp) This mod introduces five unique constructions to the Nether dimension, each crafted in a striking medieval style to seamlessly blend with your game. Best of all, it’s fully compatible with most mods that alter Nether generation! If you love exploring structures, admire stunning architecture, or are drawn to the mystique of ancient times, this mod is perfect for your adventure. Add it to your modpack and dive into the new wave of Nether structures! ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Medieval_Buildings_Nether_Edition/BH_MBNE_faq.webp) ### Is it compatible with other mods that add structures? ### Without a doubt, it is perfectly compatible with any other mod, both structures and biomes. ### Where can the new structures be found? ### Only in the Nether dimension. They will be generated randomly and following certain parameters so that they are not too frequent. ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Medieval_Buildings_Nether_Edition/BH_MBNE_screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9zKI9xOD/images/1ec815f93f0221a471039e66dadfe7f41e85bee5.jpeg) ![Screenshtos 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9zKI9xOD/images/f59ae190ac6892e19a8993860f7638f805bc7c9b.jpeg) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9zKI9xOD/images/81d8b51e8ac7c768374912d6fdafef4c315dc632.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
